title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Manya Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Manya Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Manya Group family as a Curriculum Developer in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Manya Group:
Manya Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manya Group!
